terms.content:
Xchanger - Terms of Use

Last Updated: April 12, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Xchanger mobile application ("App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the App.

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our"). We may update these Terms from time to time, and your continued use of the App after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

2. Description of Service

Xchanger is a currency converter application that provides exchange rate information and currency conversion services. The App offers:

  • Real-time and historical exchange rate data
  • Currency conversion calculations
  • Offline functionality (Premium feature)
  • Additional premium features available through subscription

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher) to use this App. By using the App, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement.

4. Account Registration

Some features of the App may require registration or account creation. You are responsible for:

  • Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
  • All activities that occur under your account
  • Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized access or security breaches
  • Providing accurate and complete information during registration

5. Exchange Rate Information

5.1 Accuracy Disclaimer

Exchange rates are provided for informational purposes only. While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date exchange rate information, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of exchange rates displayed in the App.

5.2 Not Financial Advice

The exchange rate information provided by the App is not financial, investment, or trading advice. You should consult with qualified financial professionals before making any financial decisions based on information from the App.

5.3 Source of Data

Exchange rate data may be sourced from third-party providers. We are not responsible for any errors or delays in data provided by these third parties.

5.4 Real-World Transactions

Exchange rates shown in the App may differ from rates offered by banks, currency exchange services, or payment processors. Actual exchange rates for real transactions will be determined by the service provider you use.

6. Premium Features and Subscriptions

6.1 Subscription Plans

The App offers premium features through subscription plans (monthly and annual). Subscription terms, pricing, and features are subject to change.

6.2 Payment Terms

  • Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis
  • Payment will be charged to your App Store or Google Play account
  • Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period

6.3 Cancellation and Refunds

  • You may cancel your subscription at any time through your device's subscription settings
  • Cancellation will take effect at the end of the current billing period
  • Refunds are subject to the policies of the App Store or Google Play Store
  • No refunds will be provided for partial subscription periods

6.4 Free Trial

If we offer a free trial, you may be charged after the trial period ends unless you cancel before the trial expires.

7. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the App for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
  • Violate any laws in your jurisdiction
  • Infringe upon the rights of others
  • Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
  • Use automated systems to access the App (scraping, bots, etc.)
  • Interfere with or disrupt the App's functionality
  • Use the App to transmit malware or harmful code
  • Impersonate others or provide false information

8. Intellectual Property

8.1 Ownership

The App, including all content, features, functionality, design, logos, and trademarks, is owned by Mango Labs and protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

8.2 Limited License

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the App for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these Terms.

8.3 Restrictions

You may not:

  • Copy, modify, or create derivative works of the App
  • Sell, lease, or sublicense the App
  • Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices
  • Use our trademarks or logos without prior written permission

9. Privacy

Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.

The App does not use a separate in-app consent screen or consent workflow to unlock core features. What we collect, how we use it, and your choices are described only in the Privacy Policy and in platform settings (for example, subscriptions managed by Apple or Google).

10. Data Storage and Offline Functionality

10.1 Local Storage

Certain data may be stored locally on your device. You are responsible for backing up your data and device security.

10.2 Offline Mode

Premium offline functionality allows you to access previously downloaded exchange rate data without an internet connection. This data may become outdated when used offline.

11. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability

11.1 Service Availability

We strive to maintain continuous service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. The App may be unavailable due to maintenance, updates, technical issues, or circumstances beyond our control.

11.2 "AS IS" Service

THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

11.3 Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES RESULTING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APP.

11.4 Maximum Liability

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.

12. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Mango Labs and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses, including reasonable attorney's fees, arising out of or in any way connected with:

  • Your use of the App
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your violation of any rights of another party
  • Your violation of any applicable laws or regulations

13. Termination

13.1 By You

You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from your device. Cancellation of subscriptions is subject to Section 6.3.

13.2 By Us

We may suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time, with or without cause or notice, if you violate these Terms or for any other reason we deem necessary.

13.3 Effect of Termination

Upon termination, your right to use the App will immediately cease. Provisions of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

14. Third-Party Services

The App may integrate with or link to third-party services, websites, or applications. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of use of third-party services. Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and conditions.

15. Geographic Restrictions

The App may be subject to restrictions in certain jurisdictions. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the App complies with all applicable local laws and regulations.

16. Dispute Resolution

16.1 Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [Jurisdiction], without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

16.2 Dispute Resolution Process

Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms or the App shall be resolved through [binding arbitration / courts of competent jurisdiction] in [Location].

17. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by:

  • Posting the updated Terms in the App
  • Updating the "Last Updated" date
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App or email

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

18. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

19. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Mango Labs regarding the use of the App and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

20. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

21. Additional Terms for App Stores

If you downloaded the App from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, the following additional terms apply:

21.1 Apple App Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs, not Apple
  • Apple is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Apple has no obligation to provide support for the App
  • In the event of App failure, you may notify Apple for a refund
  • Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms

21.2 Google Play Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs
  • Google is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Your use of the App is subject to Google Play Store's terms and conditions
By using Xchanger, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use.

privacy.content:
Xchanger - Privacy Policy

Last Updated: April 12, 2026

1. Introduction

Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use the Xchanger mobile application ("App").

By using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use the App.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide

Payment and Subscription Information
  • Subscription status and preferences
  • Customer identifier (anonymized customer ID through RevenueCat)
  • Payment information is processed by Apple App Store or Google Play Store (we do not store your payment details)

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

App Usage Data
  • Recently used currencies and their timestamps
  • Last selected currency pairs (from/to currencies)
  • Subscription status cache (stored locally)
Device and Technical Information
  • Device type, operating system, and app version (may be included if crash reporting to our error tracking provider is enabled for your build)
  • Crash reports and error logs (only if crash reporting to that provider is enabled; in the current App configuration this reporting is off, so routine crashes are not sent to Sentry)
  • IP addresses are explicitly removed from any error reports that are sent when reporting is enabled
Local Storage
  • Exchange rate data (downloaded and stored locally for offline use)
  • Currency information (downloaded and stored locally)

2.3 Information We Do NOT Collect

We do NOT collect:

  • Personal identification information (names, email addresses, phone numbers)
  • Location data
  • Contact lists or device contacts
  • Photos, videos, or other media files
  • Browsing history or web activity outside the App
  • IP addresses (these are explicitly removed from any data we might receive)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide and Maintain the App: Deliver currency conversion services, exchange rate information, and App functionality
  • Improve User Experience: Remember your currency preferences and recently used currencies to provide personalized features
  • Support Premium Features: Manage subscription status and provide premium functionality
  • Error Tracking and Debugging: Identify and fix technical issues when crash reporting to Sentry is enabled for your build (see Section 5.1)
  • Comply with Legal Obligations: Meet legal requirements and respond to lawful requests

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1 Local Storage

Your Data Stays on Your Device

The majority of your data is stored locally on your device in encrypted storage:

  • Secure Storage: We use Expo SecureStore, which provides encrypted local storage on your device
  • SQLite Database: Exchange rates and currency data are stored in a local SQLite database on your device
  • No Cloud Sync: We do not synchronize your data to cloud servers
Data Stored Locally:
  • Recently used currencies and timestamps
  • Last selected currency pairs
  • Subscription status cache
  • Exchange rate data (for offline functionality)
  • Currency information

4.2 Encryption

  • All locally stored preferences and settings are encrypted using your device's secure storage capabilities
  • Exchange rate data stored in SQLite is accessible only within the App
  • We use industry-standard encryption methods provided by your device's operating system

4.3 Data Retention

  • Local Data: Data stored on your device remains there until you uninstall the App or manually clear the App's data
  • Error Tracking Data: If crash reporting to Sentry is enabled, crash reports are retained by Sentry according to their data retention policies (typically 90 days). While reporting is disabled in the App as distributed, we do not receive an ongoing stream of crash data from Sentry for ordinary use
  • Subscription Data: Subscription information is managed through RevenueCat and App Store/Google Play, subject to their respective retention policies

5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services to support App functionality:

5.1 Error Tracking (Sentry)

Purpose:

To identify and fix technical issues and improve App stability

Data Collected:
  • Crash reports and error logs
  • Device type, operating system, and app version
  • Stack traces and error context
Privacy Measures:
  • Crash reporting is integrated but not active in the default App configuration (reporting must be enabled in the build)
  • Personal Identifiable Information (PII) collection is disabled
  • IP addresses are explicitly removed from all data
  • No user identifiers or personal information is collected

Service Provider: Sentry, Inc. (https://sentry.io/)

Privacy Policy: https://sentry.io/privacy/

5.2 Subscription Management (RevenueCat)

Purpose:

To manage subscriptions and premium features

Data Collected:
  • Anonymous customer identifier (device-specific, not personally identifiable)
  • Subscription status and entitlement information
  • Transaction history (managed by App Store/Google Play)

Service Provider: RevenueCat, Inc. (https://www.revenuecat.com/)

Privacy Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy

5.3 Payment Processing (App Store / Google Play)

Purpose:

To process subscription payments

Data Collected:
  • Payment information (handled entirely by Apple or Google)
  • Purchase history and receipts
Service Providers:
  • Apple Inc. (for iOS): https://www.apple.com/privacy/
  • Google LLC (for Android): https://policies.google.com/privacy

Note: We do not have access to your payment details. All payment information is processed directly by Apple or Google.

5.4 Exchange Rate Data

Purpose:

To provide current and historical exchange rate information

Data Source:

Exchange rate data is obtained from third-party financial data providers

Note: We are not responsible for the accuracy, timeliness, or privacy practices of these third-party data providers.

6. Your Privacy Rights and Choices

6.1 Your Choices

The App does not present a separate in-app screen to accept or reject "data processing consent" before you use it. You still control important privacy-related choices as follows:

  • Subscriptions: Manage or cancel subscriptions through your App Store or Google Play account settings
  • Local data: Clear the App's data or uninstall the App from your device to remove locally stored information (see Section 6.3)
  • Crash reporting: When disabled (as in the default configuration), diagnostic data is not sent to Sentry as described in Sections 2.2 and 5.1

6.2 Access to Your Data

Since most data is stored locally on your device:

  • You can access your locally stored preferences through the App
  • You can clear App data at any time through your device settings
  • If crash reporting to Sentry is ever enabled and you have questions about data held there, you may request information by contacting us

6.3 Data Deletion

Local Data:
  • Uninstalling the App will delete all locally stored data
  • You can also clear App data through your device settings without uninstalling
Error Tracking Data:
  • If crash reporting to Sentry is enabled and you wish to have related data deleted from Sentry, please contact us
Subscription Data:
  • Subscription information is managed through App Store or Google Play
  • Canceling your subscription does not delete historical transaction records maintained by Apple or Google

6.4 GDPR Rights (European Users)

If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:

  • Right to Access: Request information about your personal data
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your data
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Request limitation of data processing
  • Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your data
  • Right to Object: Object to processing of your data
  • Right to Withdraw Consent: Where we rely on consent as a legal basis, you may withdraw it at any time (the App does not use a dedicated in-app consent toggle for this purpose)

To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

6.5 California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):

  • Right to know what personal information is collected
  • Right to delete personal information
  • Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)
  • Right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights

7. Children's Privacy

The App is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

If we discover that we have collected information from a child under 13, we will delete that information promptly.

8. International Data Transfers

Your data is primarily stored locally on your device. However, some third-party services we use (such as Sentry and RevenueCat) may process data outside your country of residence. These services have implemented appropriate safeguards to protect your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

9. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by:

  • Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
  • Posting a notice in the App (for significant changes)
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible, typically within 30 days.

11. Data Controller

Data Controller: Mango Labs

For questions about data processing or to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

12. Additional Information

12.1 Offline Functionality

When using the App in offline mode (Premium feature), the App uses previously downloaded exchange rate data stored locally on your device. This data may become outdated when used offline.

12.2 Data Minimization

We collect and process only the minimum amount of data necessary to provide App functionality and improve user experience.

12.3 No Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We only share data with service providers necessary for App functionality (as described in Section 5), and only with appropriate privacy protections in place.

12.4 App Permissions

The App may request the following permissions:

  • Internet Access: Required to download exchange rate data and manage subscriptions
  • Network State: Required to determine online/offline status
  • Billing (Android): Required for in-app purchases and subscriptions

The App does not request access to:

  • Location services
  • Contacts
  • Camera or microphone
  • Photo library
  • Calendar
  • Other sensitive permissions
By using Xchanger, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and agree to the collection and use of your information as described herein.

terms.content:
SunRouter - Terms of Use

Last Updated: February 7, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the SunRouter mobile application ("App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the App.

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our"). We may update these Terms from time to time, and your continued use of the App after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

2. Description of Service

SunRouter is a route planning and multi-stop navigation application that helps users create, optimize, and navigate routes with multiple stops. The App offers:

  • Route creation with origin, destination, and multiple stops
  • Place search powered by Google Places
  • Route computation and directions via Google Routes
  • Navigation integration with Google Maps, Apple Maps, and Waze
  • Stop tracking during navigation
  • Support for multiple vehicle types (car, bicycle, walk, two-wheeler)
  • Route optimization (Premium feature)
  • Unlimited routes and up to 25 stops per route (Premium feature)
  • Additional premium features available through subscription

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher) to use this App. By using the App, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement.

4. Route and Navigation Information

4.1 Accuracy Disclaimer

Route information, directions, distances, and estimated travel times are provided for informational and planning purposes only. While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date route data, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of information displayed in the App.

4.2 Not a Substitute for Safe Navigation

The route and navigation information provided by the App is not a substitute for careful, attentive driving and safe navigation practices. You are solely responsible for your safety and the safety of others while following routes suggested by the App. Always obey local traffic laws and road signs.

4.3 Source of Data

Route and place data is sourced from Google Maps Platform (Google Places API and Google Routes API). We are not responsible for any errors, delays, or inaccuracies in data provided by these third-party services.

4.4 Real-World Conditions

Routes displayed in the App may not reflect real-time road conditions, closures, construction, or other hazards. Actual travel times and conditions may differ from those shown in the App.

5. Premium Features and Subscriptions

5.1 Subscription Plans

The App offers premium features through subscription plans (monthly and annual). Subscription terms, pricing, and features are subject to change.

5.2 Premium Features Include

  • Route optimization (automatic reordering of stops for efficiency)
  • Unlimited routes
  • Up to 25 stops per route

5.3 Payment Terms

  • Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis
  • Payment will be charged to your App Store or Google Play account
  • Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period

5.4 Cancellation and Refunds

  • You may cancel your subscription at any time through your device's subscription settings
  • Cancellation will take effect at the end of the current billing period
  • Refunds are subject to the policies of the App Store or Google Play Store
  • No refunds will be provided for partial subscription periods

5.5 Free Trial

If we offer a free trial, you may be charged after the trial period ends unless you cancel before the trial expires.

6. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the App for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
  • Violate any laws in your jurisdiction
  • Infringe upon the rights of others
  • Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
  • Use automated systems to access the App (scraping, bots, etc.)
  • Interfere with or disrupt the App's functionality
  • Use the App to transmit malware or harmful code
  • Impersonate others or provide false information
  • Use the App while driving or operating a vehicle in a manner that distracts from safe operation

7. Intellectual Property

7.1 Ownership

The App, including all content, features, functionality, design, logos, and trademarks, is owned by Mango Labs and protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

7.2 Limited License

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the App for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these Terms.

7.3 Restrictions

You may not:

  • Copy, modify, or create derivative works of the App
  • Sell, lease, or sublicense the App
  • Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices
  • Use our trademarks or logos without prior written permission

7.4 Third-Party Content

The App uses data from Google Maps Platform. Google Maps content is subject to Google's Terms of Service and may not be copied, redistributed, or used outside of the App.

8. Privacy

Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.

9. Data Storage

9.1 Local Storage

All route data, places, and preferences are stored locally on your device. You are responsible for backing up your data and device security.

9.2 No Cloud Sync

We do not synchronize your data to cloud servers. If you uninstall the App or switch devices, your locally stored data will be lost.

10. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability

10.1 Service Availability

We strive to maintain continuous service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. The App may be unavailable due to maintenance, updates, technical issues, or circumstances beyond our control.

10.2 Third-Party Service Dependencies

The App depends on third-party services (Google Maps Platform, etc.) for route computation and place search. We do not control and cannot guarantee the availability, accuracy, or performance of these services.

10.3 "AS IS" Service

THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

10.4 Navigation Disclaimer

WE ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY ACCIDENTS, INJURIES, DAMAGES, OR LOSSES THAT MAY OCCUR WHILE YOU ARE FOLLOWING ROUTES OR DIRECTIONS PROVIDED BY THE APP. USE THE APP'S NAVIGATION FEATURES AT YOUR OWN RISK AND ALWAYS EXERCISE CAUTION.

10.5 Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES RESULTING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APP.

10.6 Maximum Liability

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.

11. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Mango Labs and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses, including reasonable attorney's fees, arising out of or in any way connected with:

  • Your use of the App
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your violation of any rights of another party
  • Your violation of any applicable laws or regulations
  • Any accidents or injuries related to navigation using the App

12. Termination

12.1 By You

You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from your device. Cancellation of subscriptions is subject to Section 5.4.

12.2 By Us

We may suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time, with or without cause or notice, if you violate these Terms or for any other reason we deem necessary.

12.3 Effect of Termination

Upon termination, your right to use the App will immediately cease. Provisions of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

13. Third-Party Services

The App integrates with the following third-party services:

  • Google Maps Platform: For place search and route computation
  • Google Maps, Apple Maps, and Waze: For turn-by-turn navigation
  • RevenueCat: For subscription management
  • Sentry: For error tracking (with your consent)

We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of use of third-party services. Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and conditions.

14. Geographic Restrictions

The App may be subject to restrictions in certain jurisdictions. Route availability and accuracy may vary by region. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the App complies with all applicable local laws and regulations.

15. Dispute Resolution

15.1 Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [Jurisdiction], without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

15.2 Dispute Resolution Process

Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms or the App shall be resolved through [binding arbitration / courts of competent jurisdiction] in [Location].

16. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by:

  • Posting the updated Terms in the App
  • Updating the "Last Updated" date
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App or email

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

17. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

18. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Mango Labs regarding the use of the App and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

19. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

20. Additional Terms for App Stores

If you downloaded the App from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, the following additional terms apply:

20.1 Apple App Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs, not Apple
  • Apple is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Apple has no obligation to provide support for the App
  • In the event of App failure, you may notify Apple for a refund
  • Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms

20.2 Google Play Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs
  • Google is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Your use of the App is subject to Google Play Store's terms and conditions
By using SunRouter, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use.

privacy.content:
SunRouter - Privacy Policy

Last Updated: February 7, 2026

1. Introduction

Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use the SunRouter mobile application ("App").

By using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use the App.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide

Consent Preferences
  • Your consent status for data processing
  • This information is stored locally on your device in encrypted storage
Payment and Subscription Information
  • Subscription status and preferences
  • Customer identifier (anonymized customer ID through RevenueCat)
  • Payment information is processed by Apple App Store or Google Play Store (we do not store your payment details)

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

Route and Navigation Data (Stored Locally)
  • Routes you create (name, origin, destination, stops, vehicle type, route preferences)
  • Route details (distance, duration, polyline data)
  • Places you save (name, address, coordinates)
  • Stop tracking status (visited/unvisited) and timestamps
  • Subscription status cache (stored locally)
App Usage Data
  • App preferences (theme, default navigation app)
  • Recently used places and timestamps
Device and Technical Information
  • Device type, operating system, and app version (collected only with your consent through error tracking)
  • Crash reports and error logs (only if you have consented to data collection)
  • IP addresses are explicitly removed from error reports

2.3 Information We Do NOT Collect

We do NOT collect:

  • Personal identification information (names, email addresses, phone numbers)
  • Contact lists or device contacts
  • Photos, videos, or other media files
  • Browsing history or web activity outside the App
  • IP addresses (these are explicitly removed from any data we might receive)
  • Your real-time location for tracking purposes (location is used only for map display and route creation within the App)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide and Maintain the App: Deliver route planning, multi-stop navigation, and place search functionality
  • Improve User Experience: Remember your saved places, route preferences, and app settings to provide a personalized experience
  • Support Premium Features: Manage subscription status and provide premium functionality such as route optimization
  • Error Tracking and Debugging: Identify and fix technical issues (only with your explicit consent)
  • Comply with Legal Obligations: Meet legal requirements and respond to lawful requests

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1 Local Storage

Your Data Stays on Your Device

The majority of your data is stored locally on your device:

  • Secure Storage: We use Expo SecureStore, which provides encrypted local storage on your device for preferences and settings
  • SQLite Database: Routes, places, stops, and related data are stored in a local SQLite database on your device
  • No Cloud Sync: We do not synchronize your data to cloud servers
Data Stored Locally:
  • Routes (origin, destination, stops, vehicle type, preferences, distance, duration)
  • Places (name, address, coordinates, saved status)
  • Stop tracking data (visited status, timestamps)
  • Your consent preferences
  • App preferences (theme, default navigation app)
  • Subscription status cache

4.2 Encryption

  • All locally stored preferences and settings are encrypted using your device's secure storage capabilities
  • Route and place data stored in SQLite is accessible only within the App
  • We use industry-standard encryption methods provided by your device's operating system

4.3 Data Retention

  • Local Data: Data stored on your device remains there until you uninstall the App or manually clear the App's data
  • Error Tracking Data: If you have consented to error tracking, crash reports are retained by Sentry according to their data retention policies (typically 90 days)
  • Subscription Data: Subscription information is managed through RevenueCat and App Store/Google Play, subject to their respective retention policies

5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services to support App functionality:

5.1 Google Maps Platform

Purpose:

To provide place search and route computation

Services Used:
  • Google Places API (place search, autocomplete, place details)
  • Google Routes API (route computation, route optimization, directions)
Data Shared:
  • Search queries when you search for places
  • Origin, destination, and stop coordinates when computing routes
  • Vehicle type and route preferences (avoid tolls, ferries, highways)

Note: Data sent to Google Maps Platform is subject to Google's Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

5.2 Error Tracking (Sentry)

Purpose:

To identify and fix technical issues and improve App stability

Data Collected:
  • Crash reports and error logs
  • Device type, operating system, and app version
  • Stack traces and error context
Privacy Measures:
  • Only enabled with your explicit consent
  • Personal Identifiable Information (PII) collection is disabled
  • IP addresses are explicitly removed from all data
  • No user identifiers or personal information is collected

Service Provider: Sentry, Inc. (https://sentry.io/)

Privacy Policy: https://sentry.io/privacy/

5.3 Subscription Management (RevenueCat)

Purpose:

To manage subscriptions and premium features

Data Collected:
  • Anonymous customer identifier (device-specific, not personally identifiable)
  • Subscription status and entitlement information
  • Transaction history (managed by App Store/Google Play)

Service Provider: RevenueCat, Inc. (https://www.revenuecat.com/)

Privacy Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy

5.4 Payment Processing (App Store / Google Play)

Purpose:

To process subscription payments

Data Collected:
  • Payment information (handled entirely by Apple or Google)
  • Purchase history and receipts
Service Providers:
  • Apple Inc. (for iOS): https://www.apple.com/privacy/
  • Google LLC (for Android): https://policies.google.com/privacy

Note: We do not have access to your payment details. All payment information is processed directly by Apple or Google.

5.5 Navigation Apps

Purpose:

To provide turn-by-turn navigation

When you choose to navigate to a stop, the App opens your selected navigation app (Google Maps, Apple Maps, or Waze) with the destination coordinates. We do not control the data practices of these navigation apps.

5.6 Analytics (Vexo)

Purpose:

To understand App usage patterns and improve the App experience

Data Collected:
  • Anonymous usage events
  • App interaction data
Privacy Measures:
  • No personally identifiable information is collected
  • Data is aggregated and anonymized

Service Provider: Vexo (https://vexo.co/)

6. Your Privacy Rights and Choices

6.1 Consent Management

You have full control over data collection:

  • Accept Consent: Enables error tracking (with privacy protections as described above)
  • Reject Consent: Disables all optional data collection; App continues to function with full features

You can change your consent preference at any time through the App settings.

6.2 Access to Your Data

Since most data is stored locally on your device:

  • You can access your locally stored routes, places, and preferences through the App
  • You can clear App data at any time through your device settings
  • For error tracking data (if consented), you may request information by contacting us

6.3 Data Deletion

Local Data:
  • Uninstalling the App will delete all locally stored data (routes, places, preferences)
  • You can also clear App data through your device settings without uninstalling
  • You can delete individual routes and places within the App
Error Tracking Data:
  • If you have consented to error tracking and wish to have your data deleted from Sentry, please contact us
Subscription Data:
  • Subscription information is managed through App Store or Google Play
  • Canceling your subscription does not delete historical transaction records maintained by Apple or Google

6.4 GDPR Rights (European Users)

If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:

  • Right to Access: Request information about your personal data
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your data
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Request limitation of data processing
  • Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your data
  • Right to Object: Object to processing of your data
  • Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time

To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

6.5 California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):

  • Right to know what personal information is collected
  • Right to delete personal information
  • Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)
  • Right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights

7. Children's Privacy

The App is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

If we discover that we have collected information from a child under 13, we will delete that information promptly.

8. International Data Transfers

Your data is primarily stored locally on your device. However, some third-party services we use (such as Google Maps Platform, Sentry, and RevenueCat) may process data outside your country of residence. These services have implemented appropriate safeguards to protect your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

9. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by:

  • Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
  • Posting a notice in the App (for significant changes)
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible, typically within 30 days.

11. Data Controller

Data Controller: Mango Labs

For questions about data processing or to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

12. Additional Information

12.1 Location Data

The App may request access to your device's location services to display your current position on the map and assist with route creation. Location data is used only within the App and is not transmitted to our servers or stored remotely. You can revoke location access at any time through your device settings; the App will continue to function but some features may be limited.

12.2 Data Minimization

We collect and process only the minimum amount of data necessary to provide App functionality and improve user experience.

12.3 No Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We only share data with service providers necessary for App functionality (as described in Section 5), and only with appropriate privacy protections in place.

12.4 App Permissions

The App may request the following permissions:

  • Location Services: Used to display your current position on the map and assist with route planning
  • Internet Access: Required to search for places, compute routes, and manage subscriptions
  • Network State: Required to determine online/offline status
  • Billing (Android): Required for in-app purchases and subscriptions

The App does not request access to:

  • Contacts
  • Camera or microphone
  • Photo library
  • Calendar
  • Other sensitive permissions
By using SunRouter, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and consent to the collection and use of your information as described herein.

terms.content:
Proportion - Terms of Use

Last Updated: February 22, 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Proportion mobile application ("App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the App.

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our"). We may update these Terms from time to time, and your continued use of the App after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

2. Description of Service

Proportion is a proportion calculator application that helps you solve direct and inverse proportion problems. The App offers:

  • Direct proportion calculations (a : b = c : x)
  • Inverse proportion calculations (a : b = x : c)
  • Simple, intuitive interface for mathematical proportion problems
  • Additional premium features available through subscription (when applicable)

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher) to use this App. By using the App, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement.

4. Account Registration

The App does not require account registration for basic use. Some premium features may require subscription through your App Store or Google Play account. When applicable, you are responsible for:

  • Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
  • All activities that occur under your account
  • Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized access or security breaches

5. Calculation Results

5.1 Accuracy Disclaimer

The App performs mathematical calculations based on the values you enter. While we strive to ensure the calculator functions correctly, we do not guarantee that the App is free of errors or suitable for any specific purpose.

5.2 Not Professional Advice

The calculation results provided by the App are for general informational and educational purposes only. They are not professional, financial, educational, or legal advice. You should consult qualified professionals before making any decisions based on calculations performed in the App.

5.3 Your Responsibility

You are responsible for verifying the accuracy of any calculations and for how you use the results. We are not liable for any decisions or actions you take based on information from the App.

6. Premium Features and Subscriptions

6.1 Subscription Plans

When premium features are available, the App may offer them through subscription plans (monthly and annual). Subscription terms, pricing, and features are subject to change.

6.2 Payment Terms

  • Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis
  • Payment will be charged to your App Store or Google Play account
  • Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period

6.3 Cancellation and Refunds

  • You may cancel your subscription at any time through your device's subscription settings
  • Cancellation will take effect at the end of the current billing period
  • Refunds are subject to the policies of the App Store or Google Play Store
  • No refunds will be provided for partial subscription periods

6.4 Free Trial

If we offer a free trial, you may be charged after the trial period ends unless you cancel before the trial expires.

7. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the App for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
  • Violate any laws in your jurisdiction
  • Infringe upon the rights of others
  • Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
  • Use automated systems to access the App (scraping, bots, etc.)
  • Interfere with or disrupt the App's functionality
  • Use the App to transmit malware or harmful code
  • Impersonate others or provide false information

8. Intellectual Property

8.1 Ownership

The App, including all content, features, functionality, design, logos, and trademarks, is owned by Mango Labs and protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

8.2 Limited License

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the App for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these Terms.

8.3 Restrictions

You may not:

  • Copy, modify, or create derivative works of the App
  • Sell, lease, or sublicense the App
  • Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices
  • Use our trademarks or logos without prior written permission

9. Privacy

Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.

10. Data Storage

10.1 Local Storage

Certain data may be stored locally on your device (e.g., subscription status cache). You are responsible for backing up your data and device security.

10.2 Calculation Data

The numbers you enter for calculations are processed locally on your device and are not transmitted to or stored on our servers.

11. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability

11.1 Service Availability

We strive to maintain continuous service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. The App may be unavailable due to maintenance, updates, technical issues, or circumstances beyond our control.

11.2 "AS IS" Service

THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

11.3 Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES RESULTING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APP.

11.4 Maximum Liability

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.

12. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Mango Labs and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses, including reasonable attorney's fees, arising out of or in any way connected with:

  • Your use of the App
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your violation of any rights of another party
  • Your violation of any applicable laws or regulations

13. Termination

13.1 By You

You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from your device. Cancellation of subscriptions is subject to Section 6.3.

13.2 By Us

We may suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time, with or without cause or notice, if you violate these Terms or for any other reason we deem necessary.

13.3 Effect of Termination

Upon termination, your right to use the App will immediately cease. Provisions of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

14. Third-Party Services

The App may integrate with or link to third-party services, websites, or applications (such as error tracking, analytics, and payment processors). We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of use of third-party services. Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and conditions.

15. Geographic Restrictions

The App may be subject to restrictions in certain jurisdictions. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the App complies with all applicable local laws and regulations.

16. Dispute Resolution

16.1 Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Brazil, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

16.2 Dispute Resolution Process

Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms or the App shall be resolved through the courts of competent jurisdiction in Brazil.

17. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by:

  • Posting the updated Terms in the App
  • Updating the "Last Updated" date
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App or email

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

18. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

19. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Mango Labs regarding the use of the App and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

20. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

21. Additional Terms for App Stores

If you downloaded the App from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, the following additional terms apply:

21.1 Apple App Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs, not Apple
  • Apple is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Apple has no obligation to provide support for the App
  • In the event of App failure, you may notify Apple for a refund
  • Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms

21.2 Google Play Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs
  • Google is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Your use of the App is subject to Google Play Store's terms and conditions
By using Proportion, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use.

privacy.content:
Proportion - Privacy Policy

Last Updated: February 22, 2025

1. Introduction

Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use the Proportion mobile application ("App").

By using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use the App.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide

Subscription Information
  • Subscription status and preferences
  • Customer identifier (anonymized customer ID through RevenueCat)
  • Payment information is processed by Apple App Store or Google Play Store (we do not store your payment details)

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

App Usage Data
  • Subscription status cache (stored locally)
Device and Technical Information
  • Device type, operating system, and app version (collected through error tracking and analytics)
  • Crash reports and error logs
  • App usage analytics (e.g., feature interactions)
Local Storage
  • Subscription status cache (stored locally for offline access)

2.3 Information We Do NOT Collect

We do NOT collect:

  • Personal identification information (names, email addresses, phone numbers)
  • Location data
  • Contact lists or device contacts
  • Photos, videos, or other media files
  • Browsing history or web activity outside the App
  • The numbers or calculations you enter in the App (these remain on your device)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide and Maintain the App: Deliver proportion calculation services and App functionality
  • Improve User Experience: Understand how the App is used to enhance features and usability
  • Support Premium Features: Manage subscription status and provide premium functionality when applicable
  • Error Tracking and Debugging: Identify and fix technical issues to improve App stability
  • Comply with Legal Obligations: Meet legal requirements and respond to lawful requests

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1 Local Storage

Your Data Stays on Your Device

The majority of your data is stored locally on your device in encrypted storage:

  • Secure Storage: We use Expo SecureStore, which provides encrypted local storage on your device
  • No Cloud Sync: We do not synchronize your calculation data or preferences to cloud servers
Data Stored Locally:
  • Subscription status cache

Calculation Data: The numbers you enter for proportion calculations are processed locally and are not transmitted to our servers or stored persistently.

4.2 Encryption

  • All locally stored preferences and settings are encrypted using your device's secure storage capabilities
  • We use industry-standard encryption methods provided by your device's operating system

4.3 Data Retention

  • Local Data: Data stored on your device remains there until you uninstall the App or manually clear the App's data
  • Error Tracking Data: Crash reports are retained by Sentry according to their data retention policies (typically 90 days)
  • Analytics Data: App usage analytics are retained according to Vexo Analytics' data retention policies
  • Subscription Data: Subscription information is managed through RevenueCat and App Store/Google Play, subject to their respective retention policies

5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services to support App functionality:

5.1 Error Tracking (Sentry)

Purpose:

To identify and fix technical issues and improve App stability

Data Collected:
  • Crash reports and error logs
  • Device type, operating system, and app version
  • Stack traces and error context

Service Provider: Sentry, Inc. (https://sentry.io/)

Privacy Policy: https://sentry.io/privacy/

5.2 Analytics (Vexo Analytics)

Purpose:

To understand app usage patterns and improve the user experience

Data Collected:
  • App usage events and interactions
  • Device and technical information

Service Provider: Vexo Analytics

Privacy Policy: https://vexo.io/privacy

5.3 Subscription Management (RevenueCat)

Purpose:

To manage subscriptions and premium features when applicable

Data Collected:
  • Anonymous customer identifier (device-specific, not personally identifiable)
  • Subscription status and entitlement information
  • Transaction history (managed by App Store/Google Play)

Service Provider: RevenueCat, Inc. (https://www.revenuecat.com/)

Privacy Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy

5.4 Payment Processing (App Store / Google Play)

Purpose:

To process subscription payments when premium features are available

Data Collected:
  • Payment information (handled entirely by Apple or Google)
  • Purchase history and receipts
Service Providers:
  • Apple Inc. (for iOS): https://www.apple.com/privacy/
  • Google LLC (for Android): https://policies.google.com/privacy

Note: We do not have access to your payment details. All payment information is processed directly by Apple or Google.

6. Your Privacy Rights and Choices

6.1 Access to Your Data

Since most data is stored locally on your device:

  • You can access your locally stored preferences through the App
  • You can clear App data at any time through your device settings
  • For error tracking or analytics data, you may request information by contacting us

6.2 Data Deletion

Local Data:
  • Uninstalling the App will delete all locally stored data
  • You can also clear App data through your device settings without uninstalling
Error Tracking Data:
  • If you wish to have your data deleted from Sentry, please contact us
Subscription Data:
  • Subscription information is managed through App Store or Google Play
  • Canceling your subscription does not delete historical transaction records maintained by Apple or Google

6.3 GDPR Rights (European Users)

If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:

  • Right to Access: Request information about your personal data
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your data
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Request limitation of data processing
  • Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your data
  • Right to Object: Object to processing of your data

To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

6.4 California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):

  • Right to know what personal information is collected
  • Right to delete personal information
  • Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)
  • Right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights

7. Children's Privacy

The App is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

If we discover that we have collected information from a child under 13, we will delete that information promptly.

8. International Data Transfers

Your data is primarily stored locally on your device. However, some third-party services we use (such as Sentry, Vexo Analytics, and RevenueCat) may process data outside your country of residence. These services have implemented appropriate safeguards to protect your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

9. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by:

  • Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
  • Posting a notice in the App (for significant changes)
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible, typically within 30 days.

11. Data Controller

Data Controller: Mango Labs

For questions about data processing or to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

12. Additional Information

12.1 Data Minimization

We collect and process only the minimum amount of data necessary to provide App functionality and improve user experience.

12.2 No Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We only share data with service providers necessary for App functionality (as described in Section 5), and only with appropriate privacy protections in place.

12.3 App Permissions

The App may request the following permissions:

  • Internet Access: Required for error tracking, analytics, and subscription management
  • Network State: Required to determine online/offline status
  • Billing (Android): Required for in-app purchases and subscriptions when applicable

The App does not request access to:

  • Location services
  • Contacts
  • Camera or microphone
  • Photo library
  • Calendar
  • Other sensitive permissions
By using Proportion, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and agree to the collection and use of your information as described herein.

terms.content:
Splitte - Terms of Use

Last Updated: March 12, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Splitte mobile application ("App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the App.

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our"). We may update these Terms from time to time, and your continued use of the App after such changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

2. Description of Service

Splitte is a bill splitting application that helps users split bills and receipts among participants. The App offers:

  • Bill and receipt creation (manual entry or camera scan)
  • Bill scanning powered by Google Gemini to extract items and prices from photos
  • Participant management for splitting bills
  • Item assignment (assigning bill items to participants)
  • Payment plan calculation (who owes what)
  • Theme customization (light, dark, or system)

Splitte is free to use.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher) to use this App. By using the App, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement.

4. Bill and Receipt Information

4.1 Accuracy Disclaimer

Bill and receipt data extracted by the scan feature is provided for convenience only. While we strive to provide accurate extraction, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or correctness of information extracted from scanned bills or receipts. You are responsible for verifying all extracted data before using it.

4.2 Not a Substitute for Verification

The bill scanning feature is a convenience tool, not a substitute for careful verification. You should always review and correct extracted items, quantities, and prices. We are not responsible for any errors in split calculations resulting from incorrect or incomplete scan data.

4.3 Source of Data

Bill scanning is powered by Google's Gemini API. We are not responsible for any errors, inaccuracies, or omissions in data extracted by this third-party service.

4.4 Scan Limitations

Scan results may vary depending on receipt quality, lighting, handwriting, and format. Some receipts may not be fully or accurately parsed. You can always manually enter or correct bill data.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the App for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
  • Violate any laws in your jurisdiction
  • Infringe upon the rights of others
  • Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
  • Use automated systems to access the App (scraping, bots, etc.)
  • Interfere with or disrupt the App's functionality
  • Use the App to transmit malware or harmful code
  • Impersonate others or provide false information
  • Scan or process images that you do not have the right to use

6. Intellectual Property

6.1 Ownership

The App, including all content, features, functionality, design, logos, and trademarks, is owned by Mango Labs and protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

6.2 Limited License

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the App for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these Terms.

6.3 Restrictions

You may not:

  • Copy, modify, or create derivative works of the App
  • Sell, lease, or sublicense the App
  • Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices
  • Use our trademarks or logos without prior written permission

6.4 Third-Party Content

The App uses Google Gemini for bill scanning. Content processed through Gemini is subject to Google's Terms of Service.

7. Privacy

Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your information.

8. Data Storage

8.1 Local Storage

All bill data, participants, item assignments, and preferences are stored locally on your device. You are responsible for backing up your data and device security.

8.2 No Cloud Sync

We do not synchronize your data to cloud servers. If you uninstall the App or switch devices, your locally stored data will be lost.

9. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability

9.1 Service Availability

We strive to maintain continuous service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. The App may be unavailable due to maintenance, updates, technical issues, or circumstances beyond our control.

9.2 Third-Party Service Dependencies

The App depends on third-party services (Google Gemini, etc.) for bill scanning. We do not control and cannot guarantee the availability, accuracy, or performance of these services.

9.3 "AS IS" Service

THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT.

9.4 Bill Splitting Disclaimer

WE ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY DISPUTES, ERRORS, OR LOSSES ARISING FROM THE USE OF THE APP FOR BILL SPLITTING. YOU ARE SOLELY RESPONSIBLE FOR VERIFYING CALCULATIONS AND RESOLVING ANY PAYMENT DISPUTES WITH OTHER PARTICIPANTS.

9.5 Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES RESULTING FROM YOUR USE OF THE APP.

9.6 Maximum Liability

OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100).

10. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Mango Labs and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses, including reasonable attorney's fees, arising out of or in any way connected with:

  • Your use of the App
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Your violation of any rights of another party
  • Your violation of any applicable laws or regulations
  • Any disputes arising from bill splitting or payment calculations made using the App

11. Termination

11.1 By You

You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from your device.

11.2 By Us

We may suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time, with or without cause or notice, if you violate these Terms or for any other reason we deem necessary.

11.3 Effect of Termination

Upon termination, your right to use the App will immediately cease. Provisions of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

12. Third-Party Services

The App integrates with the following third-party services:

  • Google Gemini API: For bill and receipt scanning
  • Sentry: For error tracking
  • Vexo: For analytics (with your consent on iOS)

We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of use of third-party services. Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and conditions.

13. Geographic Restrictions

The App may be subject to restrictions in certain jurisdictions. Bill scanning availability and accuracy may vary by region. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the App complies with all applicable local laws and regulations.

14. Dispute Resolution

14.1 Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Brazil, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

14.2 Dispute Resolution Process

Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms or the App shall be resolved through the courts of competent jurisdiction in Brazil.

15. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by:

  • Posting the updated Terms in the App
  • Updating the "Last Updated" date
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App or email

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

16. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

17. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Mango Labs regarding the use of the App and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

18. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

19. Additional Terms for App Stores

If you downloaded the App from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, the following additional terms apply:

19.1 Apple App Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs, not Apple
  • Apple is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Apple has no obligation to provide support for the App
  • In the event of App failure, you may notify Apple for a refund
  • Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms

19.2 Google Play Store

  • These Terms are between you and Mango Labs
  • Google is not responsible for the App or its content
  • Your use of the App is subject to Google Play Store's terms and conditions
By using Splitte, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use.

privacy.content:
Splitte - Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 12, 2026

1. Introduction

Mango Labs ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use the Splitte mobile application ("App"). Splitte is free to use.

By using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use the App.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide

Bill and Split Data
  • Bills you create (name, establishment name, tax percentage, tip)
  • Bill items (name, quantity, unit price)
  • Participants (names you assign to split bills)
  • Item assignments (which items are assigned to which participants)

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

Bill and Split Data (Stored Locally)
  • Bills, bill items, participants, and item assignments
  • Theme preference (light, dark, or system)
Bill Image Processing

When you scan a bill or receipt using the camera, the image is sent to Google's Gemini API to extract bill details (establishment name, items, prices). The image is processed for this purpose only and is subject to Google's data processing practices.

App Usage Data
  • App preferences and settings
Device and Technical Information
  • Device type, operating system, and app version (collected through error tracking)
  • Crash reports and error logs
  • IP addresses are explicitly removed from error reports

2.3 Information We Do NOT Collect

We do NOT collect:

  • Email addresses or phone numbers
  • Contact lists or device contacts
  • Browsing history or web activity outside the App
  • IP addresses (these are explicitly removed from any data we might receive)
  • Your location (the App does not use location services)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Provide and Maintain the App: Deliver bill splitting, receipt scanning, and payment plan functionality
  • Improve User Experience: Remember your bills, participants, and app settings to provide a personalized experience
  • Bill Scanning: Process receipt and bill images through Google's Gemini API to extract items and prices for easier data entry
  • Error Tracking and Debugging: Identify and fix technical issues
  • Comply with Legal Obligations: Meet legal requirements and respond to lawful requests

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1 Local Storage

Your Data Stays on Your Device

The majority of your data is stored locally on your device:

  • SQLite Database: Bills, bill items, participants, item assignments, and theme preference are stored in a local SQLite database on your device
  • No Cloud Sync: We do not synchronize your bill and split data to cloud servers
Data Stored Locally:
  • Bills (name, establishment name, tax, tip, creation date)
  • Bill items (name, quantity, unit price)
  • Participants (name, creation date)
  • Item assignments (which items belong to which participants)
  • Theme preference

4.2 Encryption

  • Data stored in SQLite is accessible only within the App
  • We use industry-standard security methods provided by your device's operating system

4.3 Data Retention

  • Local Data: Data stored on your device remains there until you uninstall the App, clear the App's data through settings, or use the "Clear Data" option in the App
  • Error Tracking Data: Crash reports are retained by Sentry according to their data retention policies (typically 90 days)
  • Bill Images: Bill images are sent to Google Gemini for processing only; we do not store the images. Google's data processing is subject to their privacy policy

5. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services to support App functionality:

5.1 Google Gemini API

Purpose:

To extract bill and receipt data from photos you scan

Services Used:
  • Gemini API (image analysis for receipt/bill parsing)
Data Shared:
  • Bill and receipt images when you use the scan feature
  • Images are processed to extract establishment name, items, quantities, and prices

Note: Data sent to Google Gemini is subject to Google's Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

5.2 Error Tracking (Sentry)

Purpose:

To identify and fix technical issues and improve App stability

Data Collected:
  • Crash reports and error logs
