  • Device type, operating system, and app version
  • Stack traces and error context
Privacy Measures:
  • Personal Identifiable Information (PII) collection is disabled (sendDefaultPii: false)
  • IP addresses are explicitly removed from all data
  • No user identifiers or personal information is collected

Service Provider: Sentry, Inc. (https://sentry.io/)

Privacy Policy: https://sentry.io/privacy/

5.3 Analytics (Vexo)

Purpose:

To understand App usage patterns and improve the App experience

Data Collected:
  • Anonymous usage events
  • App interaction data
Privacy Measures:
  • On iOS, analytics are initialized only after you grant App Tracking Transparency permission
  • No personally identifiable information is collected
  • Data is aggregated and anonymized

Service Provider: Vexo (https://vexo.co/)

6. Your Privacy Rights and Choices

6.1 Tracking Transparency (iOS)

On iOS, you may be prompted to allow or deny tracking for personalized content and analytics. Your choice affects whether Vexo analytics are initialized. The App functions fully regardless of your choice.

6.2 Access to Your Data

Since most data is stored locally on your device:

  • You can access your bills, participants, and preferences through the App
  • You can clear all App data at any time through the "Clear Data" option in Settings
  • For error tracking data, you may request information by contacting us

6.3 Data Deletion

Local Data:
  • Uninstalling the App will delete all locally stored data (bills, participants, preferences)
  • You can use the "Clear Data" option in App Settings to delete all data without uninstalling
  • You can delete individual bills within the App
Error Tracking Data:
  • If you wish to have your data deleted from Sentry, please contact us

6.4 GDPR Rights (European Users)

If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:

  • Right to Access: Request information about your personal data
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your data
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Request limitation of data processing
  • Right to Data Portability: Request transfer of your data
  • Right to Object: Object to processing of your data
  • Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time

To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

6.5 California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):

  • Right to know what personal information is collected
  • Right to delete personal information
  • Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)
  • Right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights

7. Children's Privacy

The App is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

If we discover that we have collected information from a child under 13, we will delete that information promptly.

8. International Data Transfers

Your data is primarily stored locally on your device. However, some third-party services we use (such as Google Gemini and Sentry) may process data outside your country of residence. These services have implemented appropriate safeguards to protect your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

9. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by:

  • Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
  • Posting a notice in the App (for significant changes)
  • In some cases, providing additional notice through the App

Your continued use of the App after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

Mango Labs

Email: hello@mangolabs.com.br

Website: https://mangolabs.com.br

We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible, typically within 30 days.

11. Data Controller

Data Controller: Mango Labs

For questions about data processing or to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us using the information provided in Section 10.

12. Additional Information

12.1 Camera Access

The App requests access to your device's camera to scan bills and receipts. Camera access is used only when you choose to scan a bill. Images are sent to Google's Gemini API for processing and are not stored by us. You can revoke camera access at any time through your device settings; the scan feature will not work without it, but you can still manually enter bill data.

12.2 Data Minimization

We collect and process only the minimum amount of data necessary to provide App functionality and improve user experience.

12.3 No Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We only share data with service providers necessary for App functionality (as described in Section 5), and only with appropriate privacy protections in place.

12.4 App Permissions

The App may request the following permissions:

  • Camera: Used to scan bills and receipts for automatic data extraction
  • Internet Access: Required to scan bills (Gemini API) and send error reports
  • Network State: Required to determine online/offline status

The App does not request access to:

  • Location services
  • Contacts
  • Microphone
  • Photo library (beyond camera capture for scanning)
  • Calendar
  • Other sensitive permissions
By using Splitte, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and consent to the collection and use of your information as described herein.
